category_sources: Official homepage describes isync as synchronizing Maildir and IMAP4 mailboxes.
source_facts.description says it synchronizes a Maildir with an IMAP server.
docs_sources: Homepage is the official project site and documentation entry point.
Official homepage links to the mbsync manual page as usage documentation.
repo_sources: Official homepage Download section links to the SourceForge Git repository.
SourceForge project page is the isync Git tree.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was researched.
tags_sources: Official homepage and manual document Maildir and IMAP4 synchronization.
source_facts.description and executables identify a command-line mailbox sync tool.
